2e55597db578743a.summary: Seven dev builds across the 1.12.10-alpha01 and 1.12.0-beta02 lines. Changes: layout and rendering fixes on iOS and Desktop, compiler-plugin and runtime fixes, and assorted bug and stability fixes. No new APIs or user-facing features.

ec41318879f5fdf3.summary: Six builds folded in (14–16 Jul): the 1.12.10-alpha01 dev line (dev4462 → dev4484), two 1.12.0-beta03 dev builds, and the 1.12.0-beta02 release. The only documented behaviour change is in beta02 — isClearFocusOnMouseDownEnabled now defaults to false. The dev builds carry no per-build changelog; lifecycle tracks 2.11.x and navigation3 1.2.0-alpha03 alongside.
